mainEntity.name: Why Traditional SEO Isn't Winning AI Overviews Anymore
mainEntity.text: Why Traditional SEO Isn't Winning AI Overviews Anymore

acceptedAnswer.text: Why is AI sending leads to other firms? It usually comes down to 'data density.' If AI models find more structured, reliable info about a competitor, they'll recommend them over you every time. You need to proactively feed these systems the right details about your successes. It's a complex, monthly process, but we've got the roadmap. Contact us to start claiming those AI referrals.
